title: Soak Test - Headset connected, app in the foreground, idle
scenario: App remains stable and responsive after prolonged idle soak test on Home Screen with paired headset
steps: 1. Install and launch the Poly Studio Mobile Android app.
2. Pair a supported Poly Bluetooth headset to the phone via the app.
3. Navigate to the app Home screen.
4. Leave the phone idle with the app in the foreground for multiple hours (e.g., 4+ hours).
5. Periodically check the app for any signs of unresponsiveness, crashes, or memory-related issues.
expected: The app remains stable, running, and responsive throughout the soak test period with no crashes, freezes, or memory leaks.
